hooks.command: STDIN=$(cat); SUB=$(echo "$STDIN" | jq -r '.tool_input.subagent_type // ""' 2>/dev/null); SID=$(echo "$STDIN" | jq -r '.session_id // ""' 2>/dev/null); INPUT=$(echo "$STDIN" | jq -r '.tool_input.description // ""' 2>/dev/null | cut -c1-300); jq -cn --arg ts "$(date -Iseconds)" --arg sid "$SID" --arg sub "$SUB" --arg inp "$INPUT" '{ts: $ts, session_id: $sid, event: "agent_start", subagent_type: $sub, input: $inp}' | bash "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/hooks/log-event.sh"

STDIN=$(cat); SKILL=$(echo "$STDIN" | jq -r '.tool_input.skill // .tool_input.command // .tool_input.name // ""' 2>/dev/null); SID=$(echo "$STDIN" | jq -r '.session_id // ""' 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$SKILL" ] && { jq -cn --arg ts "$(date -Iseconds)" --arg sid "$SID" --arg sk "$SKILL" '{ts: $ts, session_id: $sid, event: "skill_invoke", skill: $sk, source: "skill_tool"}' | bash "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/hooks/log-event.sh"; }; exit 0

STDIN=$(cat); FILE_PATH=$(echo "$STDIN" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.claude/agents/.*\.md$'; then echo "$(date -Iseconds) $FILE_PATH (edit detected; consider running /audit-subagents)" | LOGFILE=subagent-edits.log bash "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/hooks/log-event.sh"; fi

STDIN=$(cat); SUB=$(echo "$STDIN" | jq -r '.tool_input.subagent_type // ""' 2>/dev/null); SID=$(echo "$STDIN" | jq -r '.session_id // ""' 2>/dev/null); INPUT=$(echo "$STDIN" | jq -r '.tool_input.description // ""' 2>/dev/null | cut -c1-300); OUTPUT=$(echo "$STDIN" | jq -r '.tool_response // "" | if type == "object" then tostring else . end' 2>/dev/null | cut -c1-300); jq -cn --arg ts "$(date -Iseconds)" --arg sid "$SID" --arg sub "$SUB" --arg inp "$INPUT" --arg out "$OUTPUT" '{ts: $ts, session_id: $sid, event: "agent_complete", subagent_type: $sub, input: $inp, output: $out}' | bash "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/hooks/log-event.sh"

STDIN=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$STDIN" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' 2>/dev/null | cut -c1-200); SID=$(echo "$STDIN" | jq -r '.session_id // ""' 2>/dev/null); jq -cn --arg ts "$(date -Iseconds)" --arg sid "$SID" --arg cmd "$CMD" '{ts: $ts, session_id: $sid, event: "bash_complete", command: $cmd}' | bash "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/hooks/log-event.sh"

STDIN=$(cat); SID=$(echo "$STDIN" | jq -r '.session_id // ""' 2>/dev/null); Q=$(echo "$STDIN" | jq -r '.tool_input // "" | if type == "object" then tostring else . end' 2>/dev/null | cut -c1-300); A=$(echo "$STDIN" | jq -r '.tool_response // "" | if type == "object" then tostring else . end' 2>/dev/null | cut -c1-300); jq -cn --arg ts "$(date -Iseconds)" --arg sid "$SID" --arg q "$Q" --arg a "$A" '{ts: $ts, session_id: $sid, event: "grill_qa", question: $q, answer: $a}' | bash "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/hooks/log-event.sh"
